description: Draft editorial overlay for 10 squad-tier players (Arsenal + Manchester City). Not merged into the app.

players.quickFact: Became a star in Portugal with Sporting CP before Arsenal made him their main striker option.
quizHints: Swedish centre-forward who wore green and white in Lisbon.
Known for powerful running and finishing in the box.
Arsenal number 9 after a big move from Sporting in 2025.
players.playingStyle: Strong centre-forward who attacks the box, holds off defenders, and finishes with power.

players.quickFact: Spain midfielder who built his reputation at Real Sociedad before joining Arsenal.
quizHints: Basque playmaker who wore blue and white in San Sebastián.
Euro 2024 winner with La Roja before his north London move.
Deep-lying passer often compared to other Spanish midfield controllers.
players.playingStyle: Calm defensive midfielder who recycles possession and sprays long diagonals.

players.quickFact: Spain goalkeeper who left Brentford’s bees for Arsenal and became a key starter in red.
quizHints: Former Brentford number one with a beard and confident footwork.
Spanish international who plays out from the back under pressure.
Replaced a long-serving Cameroonian keeper at the Emirates.
players.playingStyle: Sweeper-keeper who claims crosses and starts attacks with short passing.

players.quickFact: Brazil centre-back who formed a famous partnership with William Saliba in Arsenal’s back line.
quizHints: South American defender who played in Portugal before north London.
Often pairs with a French centre-back in a two-man Arsenal defence.
Physical in the air and aggressive in one-on-one duels.
players.playingStyle: Dominant centre-back who wins headers, steps out of the line, and leads vocally.

players.quickFact: Hale End academy graduate who broke through as a versatile young defender for Arsenal.
quizHints: Teenager from Arsenal’s own academy who can play left-back or midfield.
London-born prospect with pace and composure beyond his years.
Part of the club’s homegrown push under Mikel Arteta.
players.playingStyle: Energetic ball-carrier with dribbling skill who fills in at full-back or midfield.

players.quickFact: Italy’s tall goalkeeper who won Euro 2020 and later joined Manchester City from Paris Saint-Germain.
quizHints: AC Milan academy product who became famous as a teenager in Serie A.
PSG number one before moving to sky blue in England.
One of the tallest regular keepers in top-level football.
players.playingStyle: Shot-stopper with long reach who commands the box and plays behind a high line.

players.quickFact: Portugal centre-back and former Manchester City captain known for organizing the defence.
quizHints: Portuguese leader who won multiple Premier League titles in sky blue.
Benfica graduate before starring for City in the late 2010s and 2020s.
Stocky defender who points and shouts to set the offside trap.
players.playingStyle: Commanding centre-back who tackles hard, reads danger early, and leads the back line.

players.quickFact: Portugal playmaker who has been one of Manchester City’s most reliable technicians since 2017.
quizHints: Small, skillful midfielder from Portugal who wears City sky blue.
Monaco star before joining Pep Guardiola’s side.
Can drift wide or central with quick feet and tight control.
players.playingStyle: Technical winger-midfielder who dribbles in tight spaces and keeps possession under pressure.

players.quickFact: Belgium winger whose low centre of gravity and burst make him hard to stop one-on-one.
quizHints: Belgian wide player who wore Rennes colours before Manchester City.
Left-footed dribbler with a distinctive stocky build.
Often attacks down the wing with sudden acceleration.
players.playingStyle: Direct winger who takes on full-backs, cuts inside, and draws fouls in wide areas.

players.quickFact: Croatia defender who starred at the 2022 World Cup before moving to Manchester City from Leipzig.
quizHints: Left-footed Croatian who played for RB Leipzig in red and white.
Can play left-back or centre-back in a back four or five.
Young defender with a powerful stride and aggressive tackling.
players.playingStyle: Modern defender who steps into midfield, drives forward, and defends aggressively.
